questions.question: What subject do the O’Callaghan twins both concentrate in?
questions.explanation: Four sets of twins speak with The Herald about navigating college life with a built-in companion.

questions.question: Which NBA player spoke via Zoom at a Brown event on Monday?
questions.explanation: The Brown contemplative studies institute hosted DeAndre Jordan, a center on the New Orleans Pelicans and current contemplative studies student.

questions.question: How many people are now in the group chat started by Jon Kletzien to organise snow shovelling in the Providence community?
questions.explanation: The Signal group chat called the snow shovelling efforts of Providence residents a “labor of love.

questions.question: What percent of Brown students are reportedly single?
questions.explanation: The Brown Marriage Pact has grown in popularity after being introduced last spring.

questions.question: Which Brown professor researches methods to support humans for 500 days on the moon and Mars?
questions.explanation: Research Professor of Earth, Environmental and Planetary Sciences James Head PhD’69 P’90 heads the 500-Day Design Reference Mission, researching practices necessary for humans to survive for 500 days on the moon and Mars.

questions.question: During what month in 2024 did Lana Del Rey originally announce her country album?
questions.explanation: Lana Del Rey’s long awaited country album was originally announced in 2024, and was recently revealed to be set for release this year.

questions.question: How much was the grant RISD received from the National Science Foundation?
questions.explanation: Using a $400,000 grant from the National Science Foundation, the Rhode Island School of Design is looking to expand its research and industry partnerships.

questions.question: Who did the late Eric Dane play on the TV show “Grey’s Anatomy?
questions.explanation: The actor featured in a recent episode of ‘Famous Last Words’ which was released after his death and mentioned both his achievements and struggles in life

questions.question: What was the theme of this year’s TEDxBrownU event?
questions.explanation: The decade-long student-run series returned on Sunday with the theme “Don’t Blink.” Numerous speakers with a diverse range of interests presented their experiences at the Salomon Center.

questions.question: How many Brown faculty members voted to replace President Christina Paxson P’19 P’MD’20 as the chair of the University’s monthly faculty meeting?
questions.explanation: At Tuesday’s meeting, 75 attendees voted in favor of the change, ultimately passing the motion.
